name: SMAC2023 modelled spring reverb impulse responses

files.name: fig7a-full-modal-model.wav
files.notes: Modelled full modal spring response from Figure 7a. This is not a guitar cab capture; the peak arrives around 84 ms and the tail lasts the full 3 seconds.
